---
title: Pyodide adapter test fixture
filters: [../_extensions/blendtutor/blendtutor.lua]
---

## Pyodide adapter test

### Exercise 1: Set variable

::: {.blendtutor language="python"}
Set `x` to 42.

```python
x = 42
```

```{.python .checks}
assert x == 42
```
:::

### Exercise 2: Fresh globals (x must not exist)

::: {.blendtutor language="python"}
The variable `x` from exercise 1 must not exist here.

```python
# x should not be defined in this fresh namespace
```

```{.python .checks}
assert "x" not in globals(), "shared globals leaked: x is visible"
```
:::
